result.summary: segment.com exposes multiple documented HTTP APIs for workspace management, event ingestion, and profile queries, plus a partner-oriented CLI for building Actions destinations.
result.description: Twilio Segment is a customer data platform that collects event data from websites, apps, and servers, then routes and unifies that data across downstream tools. It also provides profile and workspace-management capabilities for Segment customers.

segment_access_token.label: Segment access token
segment_access_token.setup: In the Segment app, go to [API Tokens](https://app.segment.com/settings/api-tokens) and create a token. The Config API auth docs state that access tokens are used in the `Authorization` header as `Bearer <token>`. Keep the token value after creation.

segment_write_key.label: Segment source write key
segment_write_key.setup: Open your source in the Segment app and copy its write key as described in [Locate your Write Key](https://segment.com/docs/connections/find-writekey/). For the HTTP Tracking API, use the write key for HTTP Basic auth; the docs say the write key is the username and the password is blank.
